form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Bendigo over 425m in 24.25. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 410m at Horsham at Grade 5 level. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Warrnambool to win by 0.8 lengths in 22.55, beating Belair Blue. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 7 over 410m at Horsham behind Lektra Sting beaten 8 lengths (23.74). Must be included.
